title: Asukas reaction to Mari in 30
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's reaction to Mari in 3.0?             Quote Post by mastervampire » Wed Jul 27, 2011 3:14 am I'm wondering what Asuka's reaction will be to Mari when 3.0 finally comes out. Mainly in regards to her piloting her Evangelion which we all know she takes great pride in also how badly she got it trashed by Zeruel.

Mainly in regards to her piloting her Evangelion which we all know she takes great pride in also how badly she got it trashed by Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:45 am She'll be pissed off, that's for sure. ...And then they had sex.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 27, 2011 9:42 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: She'll be pissed off, that's for sure. ...And then they had sex.

[]:             Quote Post by SecretPerson » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:11 am Asuka would get pissed off and take an immediate disliking towards Mari. From that point onwards, Asuka would keep Mari well away from her precious Unit-02/07/whatever considering every Eva that comes in physical contact with Mari gets trashed. Sailor Star Dust wrote: ...And then they had sex.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:30 am I was about to post something about hot lesbian sex but then I noticed this... Sailor Star Dust wrote: She'll be pissed off, that's for sure. ...And then they had sex.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:40 am I'd think Asuka would yell at Mari for a while, then Mari would reply with a flat "Are you done yet?" Followed by an epic 'Reason You Suck' speech.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:45 am Asuka will throw a fit. Mari ignores it and leans in for a sniff. "...what?" "You smell gooood. GLOMP!" and yes, I want Mari to actually yell glomp as she does so.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Jul 27, 2011 12:26 pm Asuka will hold Mari in contempt to such a degree that the enmity Asuka had for Rei in the original series will pale in comparison.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jul 27, 2011 12:46 pm Trajan wrote: Asuka will hold Mari in contempt to such a degree that the enmity Asuka had for Rei in the original series will pale in comparison.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Wed Jul 27, 2011 12:49 pm Shikinami, in all her moeness, is an expy of NGE!Shinji. Mari is Sohryu's reincarnation. trollface.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jul 27, 2011 2:45 pm They will be fanservicey with each other.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Wed Jul 27, 2011 4:53 pm As if they'll even meet.

[]:             Quote Post by SecretPerson » Wed Jul 27, 2011 5:22 pm Nonoriri wrote: As if they'll even meet.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 27, 2011 5:27 pm I'll be looking forward to this.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Wed Jul 27, 2011 5:58 pm ^ As will we all be, Stryker. BiQ wrote: Shikinami, in all her moeness, is an expy of NGE!Shinji. Mari is Sohryu's reincarnation. trollface.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Jul 27, 2011 7:28 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: All in, like, two minutes. "What the hell did you do to my precious Unit 02?" "Made it AWESOME!" "Shut up! You ruined it with it's giant fangs... and the protrusions on its back..." "...the horny face and grizzly smile..." "...the way it's constantly bending over..." "...like a dog..." "...a dirty dog...." "Kiss me you fool!" *kissing sounds* And that's the closest I'll ever come to writing a dirty fan-fiction.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Jul 27, 2011 7:49 pm Asuka will rip out one of Mari's eyes. Thus creating the EyebPatch Sisters. THEN when they run into one of the Rei clones they'll think she's the Rei who stole Shinji & then they'll rip out both of her eyes. Rei Clone will start to wear double eye patches.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:41 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: She'll be pissed off, that's for sure. ...And then they had sex.
